workspace.description: Absolute or ~-relative path to the ICM workspace folder. Required. Validated at boot.

default_judge_posture.description: Posture name (registered via nexus.agent.postures) used for `type: llm` predicates when the predicate does not name an explicit `model:` posture. Required when any predicate uses type: llm.

default_workflow_posture.description: Optional base posture name. When a stage's contract does not name an `agent.posture:`, ICM inherits Model/AllowedTools/Budget/MaxRecursionDepth from this posture before applying stage overrides.

cache_size.description: Per-run delegate cache capacity. 0 (default) disables caching — ICM stages typically have tool side effects, predicate retries, and HITL gates that make cached cross-run results hostile.

inline_artifact_limit_bytes.description: Maximum size for inlining an artifact body into the XML payload. Above this threshold ICM emits <artifact_ref/> and the LLM uses read_file. Default 32768.

loop_max_restarts.description: Per-stage cap on loop-exhaustion restarts. 0 = unlimited. Default 3. Prevents infinite restart cycles when a workspace cannot converge.

input_filename.description: Name for the file written into <runID>/00_input/ when io.input carries direct content (not a file path). Default `input.txt`.

treat_input_as_path_if_exists.description: When true, io.input.Content is interpreted as a file path if os.Stat succeeds, and the file is copied into 00_input/. Otherwise io.input.Content is written as input_filename. Default true.

workspace_inputs_dir.description: Optional directory whose regular files are copied into <runID>/00_input/ at run start, before any io.input content. Useful for workspaces with static initial-input fixtures.

auto_include_skill_reference_tool.description: When true (default), ICM automatically appends the read_skill_reference tool to each derived stage posture whose contract declares inputs.skills. Set false to require explicit listing in agent.tools.

predicate_command_timeout_seconds.description: Default timeout for `type: command` predicates when neither the predicate nor the stage budget specifies one. Default 30.

emit_progress_thinking_steps.description: When true (default), ICM emits thinking.step events with Phase="icm.<stage_id>" so UIs that render thinking surfaces show stage transitions inline.
